summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MoneyBook AI shadow parse fix and admin functionality. Successfully verified that the Emergent LLM integration works correctly, AI shadow parse generates transaction data, admin login functions properly, and image upload/display continues to work. Backend APIs all passing, frontend functionality verified, with one minor frontend queue refresh issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Queue items sometimes don't display in admin dashboard UI despite being available via API
ui_bugs.note: Queue polling or refresh mechanism may have timing issues. API returns queue items correctly but UI doesn't always show them immediately.

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/health)
Login API with phone number authentication (/api/login)
Messages API polling (/api/messages)
Send message API (/api/message)
Profile API (/api/profile)
Analytics API (/api/analytics)
Dues API (/api/dues)
Image upload API (/api/image) with correct /api/uploads/ media_url
Image accessibility via external URL with /api/uploads/ path
CORS headers configuration
Admin login with credentials admin/admin123 (/api/admin/login)
Admin queue API (/api/admin/queue) with authentication
Admin pick queue API (/api/admin/queue/{id}/pick) with authentication
Shadow parse functionality - images uploaded create queue items
AI prefill data generation - queue item 4 has proper IN/OUT transaction entries
AI shadow parse using emergentintegrations library with Emergent LLM key
Frontend login screen loads correctly
Phone number input field functionality
Login flow with 10-digit phone number
Chat window navigation after login
Image display in chat interface using correct /api/uploads/ path
Image upload functionality creates queue items for admin processing
Image clickability for opening in new tab
Admin dashboard login with admin/admin123 credentials
Admin dashboard UI components (queue sidebar, form area, action buttons)
Image display in admin dashboard with correct /api/uploads/ path
Form structure with JAMA (IN) and NAAM (OUT) columns
Image rotation controls (CCW, CW, Reset)
Manual data entry in admin form fields
Action buttons (Save & Next, Bad Photo, Skip) functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor frontend issue: Admin dashboard queue items sometimes don't display immediately despite being available via API. This appears to be a queue polling/refresh timing issue rather than a functional problem. The core AI shadow parse functionality is working correctly.

success_percentage.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed including new admin and shadow parse tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor queue refresh issue)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (AI shadow parse integration working correctly with emergentintegrations library)
